title: PPIP -  Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Share Data
scenario: Verify that after onboarding, tapping "Share Data" on the PPIP dialog enables the Share Data toggle in Account settings and displays the Home screen.
steps: Start app fresh, go through onboarding, tap "Continue as Guest" → PPIP dialog appears with "Help us improve your experience."
Tap "Share Data" on the dialog, then handle location permission (iOS only) → Dialog closes and Home screen is displayed.

Navigate to App Settings > General > Account → "Share data" toggle is ON with description text explaining data sharing (device model, serial number, software version, feature usage; no personal info shared with third parties).
expected: PPIP dialog appears with "Help us improve your experience." after tapping "Continue as Guest". After tapping "Share Data", dialog closes and Home screen is displayed. In App Settings > General > Account, the "Share data" toggle is ON with description text explaining data sharing (device model, serial number, software version, feature usage; no personal info shared with third parties).
